diffs.patch:
Index: bench-artifacts/helper-read-write-ledger.md
===================================================================
--- bench-artifacts/helper-read-write-ledger.md	
+++ bench-artifacts/helper-read-write-ledger.md	
@@ -0,0 +1,165 @@
+# Helper Read/Write Ledger
+
+## src/helper/factory/index.ts
+- Main exports or names: Factory, createFactory, createMiddleware
+- Reads as: 375 lines, TypeScript generic type definitions and class
+- Neighbor files: src/hono, src/hono-base, src/types, src/utils/url
+- Safe summary: Factory helper provides createApp, createHandlers, and createMiddleware with extensive generic type support for up to 9/10 handlers with environment merging
+
+## src/helper/route/index.ts
+- Main exports or names: matchedRoutes, routePath, baseRoutePath, basePath
+- Reads as: 141 lines, Context routing utilities
+- Neighbor files: src/context, src/request, src/types, src/utils/url
+- Safe summary: Route helper exports four functions to inspect matched routes, get path, base route path, and calculated base path with parameter substitution
+
+## src/helper/websocket/index.ts
+- Main exports or names: defineWebSocketHelper, WSContext, WSEvents, UpgradeWebSocket
+- Reads as: 140 lines, WebSocket types and upgrade handler
+- Neighbor files: src/context, src/types, src/utils/http-status
+- Safe summary: WebSocket helper provides type definitions for events, context, and upgrade functions for creating WebSocket connections
+
+## src/helper/cookie/index.ts
+- Main exports or names: getCookie, getSignedCookie, setCookie, setSignedCookie, deleteCookie, generateCookie, generateSignedCookie
+- Reads as: 145 lines, Cookie management utilities
+- Neighbor files: src/context, src/utils/cookie
+- Safe summary: Cookie helper provides signed and unsigned get/set/delete functions with support for __Secure- and __Host- prefix options
+
+## src/helper/testing/index.ts
+- Main exports or names: testClient, hc
+- Reads as: 27 lines, Testing client wrapper
+- Neighbor files: src/client, src/client/types, src/context, src/hono, src/types, src/utils/types
+- Safe summary: Testing helper wraps Hono app with hc client for local test requests with optional custom Fetch and execution context
+
+## src/helper/adapter/index.ts
+- Main exports or names: env, getRuntimeKey, checkUserAgentEquals, knownUserAgents, Runtime
+- Reads as: 90 lines, Runtime detection utilities
+- Neighbor files: src/context
+- Safe summary: Adapter helper detects runtime (deno, bun, node, workerd, fastly, edge-light) and provides env access with type inference
+
+## src/helper/css/index.ts
+- Main exports or names: css, cx, keyframes, viewTransition, Style, createCssContext
+- Reads as: 252 lines, CSS-in-JS runtime helper
+- Neighbor files: src/helper/html, src/jsx, src/jsx/dom, src/utils/html, src/helper/css/common
+- Safe summary: CSS helper exports experimental styled components with class name deduplication, keyframes, view transitions, and nonce support
+
+## src/helper/css/common.ts
+- Main exports or names: cssCommon, cxCommon, keyframesCommon, viewTransitionCommon, buildStyleString, minify
+- Reads as: 328 lines, CSS core utilities and type definitions
+- Neighbor files: src/helper/css
+- Safe summary: CSS common module provides utility functions for building style strings, computing hashes, and supporting CSS variable types and class names
+
+## src/helper/proxy/index.ts
+- Main exports or names: proxy
+- Reads as: 190 lines, Proxy fetch wrapper
+- Neighbor files: src/http-exception, src/utils/headers
+- Safe summary: Proxy helper wraps fetch with hop-by-hop header removal, connection header validation, and Request object forwarding for upstream proxies
+
+## src/helper/dev/index.ts
+- Main exports or names: showRoutes, inspectRoutes, getRouterName
+- Reads as: 79 lines, Development debugging tools
+- Neighbor files: src/hono, src/types, src/utils/color, src/utils/handler
+- Safe summary: Dev helper provides route inspection and colorful route listing with optional middleware filtering
+
+## src/helper/html/index.ts
+- Main exports or names: html, raw
+- Reads as: 57 lines, HTML templating utility
+- Neighbor files: src/utils/html
+- Safe summary: HTML helper creates HtmlEscapedString objects with template literal support and child callbacks for runtime rendering
+
+## src/helper/ssg/index.ts
+- Main exports or names: toSSG, defaultPlugin, redirectPlugin, ssgParams, isSSGContext, disableSSG, onlySSG
+- Reads as: 14 lines, SSG helper re-export module
+- Neighbor files: src/helper/ssg/ssg, src/helper/ssg/middleware, src/helper/ssg/plugins
+- Safe summary: SSG index exports all static site generation APIs including toSSG function, params middleware, and plugins for hook injection
+
+## src/helper/ssg/ssg.ts
+- Main exports or names: toSSG, fetchRoutesContent, saveContentToFile, SSGPlugin, ToSSGResult
+- Reads as: 470 lines, Core SSG implementation
+- Neighbor files: src/client, src/hono, src/types, src/utils/concurrent, src/utils/mime, src/helper/ssg/middleware, src/helper/ssg/plugins, src/helper/ssg/utils
+- Safe summary: Main SSG implementation fetches routes, handles plugins/hooks, processes content with file path generation and outDir security
+
+## src/helper/ssg/utils.ts
+- Main exports or names: dirname, joinPaths, filterStaticGenerateRoutes, isDynamicRoute, ensureWithinOutDir
+- Reads as: 87 lines, SSG utility functions
+- Neighbor files: src/hono, src/router, src/types, src/utils/handler, src/helper/ssg
+- Safe summary: SSG utils provide path manipulation helpers and route filtering for static content routes
+
+## src/helper/ssg/middleware.ts
+- Main exports or names: ssgParams, isSSGContext, disableSSG, onlySSG, SSG_CONTEXT
+- Reads as: 83 lines, SSG middleware handlers
+- Neighbor files: src/context, src/types, src/helper/ssg/utils, src/helper/ssg
+- Safe summary: SSG middleware exports param generation for dynamic routes, context detection, and route exclusion flags
+
+## src/helper/streaming/index.ts
+- Main exports or names: stream, streamSSE, streamText, SSEMessage
+- Reads as: 9 lines, Streaming re-export hub
+- Neighbor files: src/helper/streaming/stream, src/helper/streaming/sse, src/helper/streaming/text
+- Safe summary: Streaming index re-exports core streaming API functions for chunked and SSE response delivery
+
+## src/helper/streaming/stream.ts
+- Main exports or names: stream
+- Reads as: 45 lines, Base stream response function
+- Neighbor files: src/context, src/utils/stream, src/helper/streaming\
